description: Build the full Agenda Cultural platform with test-first incremental stories across backend, web, admin, and mobile.

userStories.title: Initialize backend skeleton
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a minimal FastAPI skeleton so the project can start implementing stories incrementally.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend app entrypoint and health route
Add initial test suite and verify at least one failing-then-passing test cycle

userStories.title: Add environment-based app config
userStories.description: As a developer, I need centralized settings so environments can be configured safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Create config module with required env vars

userStories.title: Configure async SQLAlchemy session
userStories.description: As a developer, I need async DB infrastructure so all routes and data access use non-blocking I/O.
acceptanceCriteria: Create async engine and async sessionmaker
Add FastAPI dependency to provide AsyncSession
No sync SQLAlchemy session usage in app code

userStories.title: Setup Alembic async migrations
userStories.description: As a developer, I need migration tooling to evolve schema safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Create baseline migration and apply successfully

userStories.title: Setup pytest async test harness
userStories.description: As a developer, I need reusable fixtures to run API and service tests consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Create async API client and DB fixtures

userStories.title: Create users table and model
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a user entity to support authentication and roles.
acceptanceCriteria: Add user model with role and active fields
Generate and apply migration for users table

userStories.title: Implement Argon2 password utilities
userStories.description: As a developer, I need secure password hashing and verification.

userStories.title: Add auth register endpoint
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to create an account using name, email, and password.
acceptanceCriteria: Response does not expose password hash

userStories.title: Add auth login endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want to log in and receive JWT tokens.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/auth/login returns access and refresh token

userStories.title: Add auth refresh endpoint
userStories.description: As an authenticated user, I want to refresh my access token without re-logging.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns new access token when refresh token is valid

userStories.title: Add current-user auth dependency
userStories.description: As a developer, I need reusable auth dependencies to protect routes.
acceptanceCriteria: Protected route returns 401 without bearer token

userStories.title: Add profile read and update endpoints
userStories.description: As an authenticated user, I want to view and edit my own profile.
acceptanceCriteria: Authenticated user can get own profile
Authenticated user can update own name and email

userStories.title: Seed first admin user
userStories.description: As a platform operator, I need the first seeded user to be admin.
acceptanceCriteria: Seed script creates admin@agendacultural.com as role admin
Admin password uses ADMIN_DEFAULT_PASSWORD env var

userStories.title: Create categories table and seed defaults
userStories.description: As a user, I need predefined event categories available from day one.
acceptanceCriteria: Seed can be re-run without duplicates

userStories.title: Add public categories endpoint
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to list event categories without authentication.

userStories.title: Create events table and model
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the event entity and status lifecycle persisted in DB.
acceptanceCriteria: Add event model with required fields and status enum
Create indexes for status, date, category_id, created_by

userStories.title: Add create event endpoint
userStories.description: As an authenticated user, I want to submit a new cultural event.
acceptanceCriteria: New event is saved with status pendente
Created event links created_by to current user

userStories.title: Add my events endpoint
userStories.description: As an authenticated user, I want to list my submitted events with status.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns only events created by current user
Includes status and rejection_reason when present

userStories.title: Implement ownership guard for user event mutations
userStories.description: As a platform owner, I need users blocked from editing/deleting events they do not own.
acceptanceCriteria: Service-level ownership check compares created_by and current user

userStories.title: Add update own event endpoint
userStories.description: As an event owner, I want to edit my event details.
acceptanceCriteria: Editing approved event resets status to pendente
Editing approved event clears reviewed_by and reviewed_at

userStories.title: Add delete own event endpoint
userStories.description: As an event owner, I want to delete or cancel my own event.
acceptanceCriteria: Endpoint removes or marks event as cancelado per project rule

userStories.title: Add public approved events endpoint
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to browse approved events with pagination.
acceptanceCriteria: Response includes items, total, page, per_page, pages

userStories.title: Add public list filters
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to filter public events by category, date interval, and neighborhood.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/events supports date_from and date_to filters

userStories.title: Add event detail endpoint
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to open full details for one event.

userStories.title: Add server-side text search endpoint
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to search events by title and description.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/events/search requires q with minimum length 2
Search runs in database against title and description
Response is paginated with metadata contract

userStories.title: Show past approved events as encerrado
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want past events clearly marked as ended.
acceptanceCriteria: Public listing marks past-date events as encerrado in response
Open events are not marked encerrado

userStories.title: Add admin-role dependency
userStories.description: As a platform owner, I need admin-only routes guarded by role checks.
acceptanceCriteria: Non-admin users receive 403 on admin routes

userStories.title: Add pending events admin endpoint
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to list pending events awaiting moderation.

userStories.title: Add approve event endpoint
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to approve pending events for public listing.

userStories.title: Add reject event endpoint
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to reject pending events and provide a reason.
acceptanceCriteria: status becomes rejeitado and rejection_reason is saved

userStories.title: Add admin all-events endpoint
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to list all events and filter by status.

userStories.title: Add admin update and delete event endpoints
userStories.description: As an admin, I want full management of event records.

userStories.title: Add admin dashboard stats endpoint
userStories.description: As an admin, I want dashboard counters for moderation and usage visibility.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/admin/dashboard returns total events and breakdown by status
Values match seeded dataset in tests

userStories.title: Add admin users list and promote endpoints
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to manage user roles.

userStories.title: Implement SeaweedFS storage service
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an S3-compatible storage abstraction for images.
acceptanceCriteria: Create storage service abstraction for upload and delete
Configure bucket and endpoint via env vars

userStories.title: Add image upload endpoint
userStories.description: As an authenticated user, I want to upload event images with validation.
acceptanceCriteria: Return public image URL on success

userStories.title: Scaffold web user app
userStories.description: As a user, I need a browser client to access public and authenticated features.
acceptanceCriteria: Create React + Vite web app structure
Add base routing and typed API client
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build web home page with list search and filters
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to discover events on the web app home page.
acceptanceCriteria: Home page shows paginated approved events
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build web auth and protected routes
userStories.description: As a user, I want login/register flows and protected pages in web client.
acceptanceCriteria: Add auth context and token persistence
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build web create edit and my-events pages
userStories.description: As an authenticated user, I want to manage my event submissions in web.
acceptanceCriteria: My events page shows status badges
Edit page shows warning + confirmation before editing approved event
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build web event detail page
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want complete event details in the web client.
acceptanceCriteria: Event detail page displays full required fields
Share action is visible and functional
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Scaffold admin web app
userStories.description: As an admin, I need a dedicated web dashboard app with role-based route protection.
acceptanceCriteria: Add admin auth flow and route guard
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build admin pending moderation page
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to approve or reject pending events from a single screen.
acceptanceCriteria: Reject action requires reason in modal
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build admin dashboard metrics page
userStories.description: As an admin, I want quick visibility of key platform metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows total events and status breakdown
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build admin events and users management pages
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to manage all events and user promotions.
acceptanceCriteria: All events page supports status filters and edit/delete actions
Users page lists users and allows promote action
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Scaffold mobile app and navigation
userStories.description: As a user, I need a mobile app baseline with navigation and API integration setup.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Expo app with navigation structure

userStories.title: Build mobile public browse flow
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to browse, search, and filter events in the mobile app.
acceptanceCriteria: Event detail screen shows full event information

userStories.title: Build mobile auth and my-events flow
userStories.description: As an authenticated user, I want to submit and manage my events on mobile.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement mobile login and register screens
Create and edit event screens submit to backend
My events screen shows status and rejection reason
Approved-event edit shows warning before save

userStories.title: Add cross-endpoint pagination contract tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need contract tests to guarantee all list endpoints return consistent pagination metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: List endpoints include items, total, page, per_page, pages
Contract tests cover public, user, and admin list endpoints

userStories.title: Add end-to-end smoke checks and release checklist
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need final smoke checks to verify all core flows before release.
acceptanceCriteria: Smoke tests cover reject flow with mandatory reason
Release checklist document is added and verified
